description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The front facade features a covered porch area with a carport and a small landscaped garden bordered by low brick planters. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with some sections featuring large, dark-framed windows and a wooden accent panel at the rear. The roof has a recessed central section, adding architectural interest and possibly allowing for skylights or ventilation. The side and rear elevations are more minimal, with fewer windows and a focus on privacy. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with a suburban or urban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, covered porch, carport, and minimalist white exterior accented by large windows and a wooden panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, carport, landscaped garden, and main entrance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the extended roof, garden area, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large wooden accent panel and the flat roof's recessed section.
description_view_3: Right side view with prominent dark-framed windows and steps leading to the porch.
